testsuite.name: Network Layer Integration

testcase.name: should aggregate health status from all components
should discover and transfer blob between two nodes
should track peer events across unified network

testsuite.system-out: 23:29:58.068 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: phDAts8OUICO6Q87jr3auA==, expected response: aOXE+3Zw+s9yFSoCdSCFlQzp4fY= 23:29:58.096 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.maxCapacityPerThread: 4096 23:29:58.097 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.ratio: 8 23:29:58.097 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.chunkSize: 32 23:29:58.097 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.blocking: false 23:29:58.097 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.batchFastThreadLocalOnly: true 23:29:58.167 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0xeddec294, L:/127.0.0.1:62491 - R:/127.0.0.1:62493] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 23:29:58.168 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: phDAts8OUICO6Q87jr3auA==, response: aOXE+3Zw+s9yFSoCdSCFlQzp4fY= Connecting to: ws://127.0.0.1:62500 23:30:10.169 [nioEventLoopGroup-51-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: 36z3Xby6DE+emuBPGar5Gg==, expected response: C4IDHGMoXClyMIwSSQ0fztP7b7Q= 23:30:10.177 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0xad1257fd, L:/127.0.0.1:62500 - R:/127.0.0.1:62503] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 23:30:10.177 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: 36z3Xby6DE+emuBPGar5Gg==, response: C4IDHGMoXClyMIwSSQ0fztP7b7Q= Connection successful
